name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES state, flag, turn

(* State variables *)

(* Init state *)
Init == /\ state = 1
        /\ flag = FALSE
        /\ turn = 1

(* Next state *)
Next == /\ state' = state + 1
        /\ flag' = flag
        /\ turn' = turn

(* Spec *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, messages, coordinator, participantStates



coordinator == 
  /\ state = "Start"
  /\ messages = <<>>
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Start"]
  /\ state' = "Prepare"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, Prepare..participantStates)
  /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
  /\ state' = "Commit" \/ state' = "Abort"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, Commit..participantStates) \/ 
                 Append(messages, Abort..participantStates)
  /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"] \/ 
                           [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]

participant(p) == 
  /\ state = "Start"
  /\ messages = <<>>
  /\ state' = "Prepare"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, Prepare..p)
  /\ state' = "VoteYes" \/ state' = "VoteNo"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, VoteYes..p) \/ 
                 Append(messages, VoteNo..p)
  /\ state' = "Commit" \/ state' = "Abort"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, Commit..p) \/ 
                 Append(messages, Abort..p)

Next == 
  /\ state = "Start" => 
     /\ coordinator' = TRUE
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Start"]
     /\ state' = "Prepare"
     /\ messages' = <<>>
  \/ state = "Prepare" => 
     /\ coordinator' = FALSE
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
     /\ state' = "VoteYes" \/ state' = "VoteNo"
     /\ messages' = <<>>
  \/ state = "VoteYes" \/ state = "VoteNo" => 
     /\ coordinator' = FALSE
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"] \/ 
                              [p \in Participants |-> "VoteNo"]
     /\ state' = "Commit" \/ state' = "Abort"
     /\ messages' = <<>>
  \/ state = "Commit" \/ state = "Abort" => 
     /\ coordinator' = FALSE
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"] \/ 
                              [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ state' = "Commit" \/ state' = "Abort"
     /\ messages' = <<>>

Init == 
  /\ state = "Start"
  /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "Start"]
  /\ messages = <<>>

Spec == 
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in {"Start", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}
  /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"Start", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
  /\ messages \in Seq({Prepare)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Producer(x) == /\ size < K
              /\ q[tail] = 0
              /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = x]
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ x = q[head]
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == \/ \E x \in 1..K: Producer(x)
       \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

Next == token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ k \in Keys
        /\ v \in Values

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

CONSTANT N, M, V

TypeOK == acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\ chosen \in V

Init == acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]] /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]] /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot + 1, value |-> proposers[p].value]] /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Promise(p) == /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> acceptors[i].ballot \cup {proposers[p].ballot}, value |-> acceptors[i].value]] /\ proposers' = proposers

Accept(p) == /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> acceptors[i].ballot \cup {proposers[p].ballot}, value |-> proposers[p].value]] /\ proposers' = proposers

Chosen(v) == /\ chosen' = v /\ acceptors' = acceptors /\ proposers' = proposers

Next == \E p \in 1..M: (Prepare(p) \/ Promise(p) \/ Accept(p) \/ Chosen(proposers[p].value))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, channel, chunks, finished, retransCount, seqNum, timer

          /\ chunks \subseteq 0..Len(File) \* Chunks are valid seqNums
          /\ retransCount \in [0..Len(File) -> 0..MaxRetries] \* Retransmission counts are valid
          /\ timer \in 0..Timeout \* Timer is within bounds
          /\ channel \subseteq 0..Len(File) \* Channel contains valid seqNums
          /\ acked \subseteq 0..Len(File) \* Acknowledged seqNums are valid
          /\ finished \in BOOLEAN \* Finished is a boolean

Init == /\ seqNum = 0
        /\ chunks = {}
        /\ retransCount = [i \in 0..Len(File) |-> 0]
        /\ timer = 0
        /\ channel = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ finished = FALSE

SendChunk == /\ seqNum < Len(File)
            /\ chunks' = chunks \cup {seqNum}
            /\ channel' = channel \cup {seqNum}
            /\ seqNum' = seqNum + 1
            /\ retransCount' = [retransCount EXCEPT ![seqNum] = 0]
            /\ timer' = Timeout
            /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, finished>>

Retransmit == /\ seqNum > 0
             /\ seqNum - 1 \in chunks
             /\ retransCount[seqNum - 1] < MaxRetries
             /\ channel' = channel \cup {seqNum - 1}
             /\ retransCount' = [retransCount EXCEPT ![seqNum - 1] = retransCount[seqNum - 1] + 1]
             /\ timer' = Timeout
             /\ UNCHANGED <<seqNum, chunks, acked, finished>>

TimeoutTick == /\ timer > 0
              /\ timer' = timer - 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<seqNum, chunks, retransCount, channel, acked, finished>>

ReceiveAck == /\ channel # {}
              /\ ch \in channel
              /\ channel' = channel \ {ch}
              /\ acked' = acked \cup {ch}
              /\ UNCHANGED <<seqNum, chunks, retransCount, timer, finished>>

Finish == /\ seqNum = Len(File)
          /\ chunks = {}
          /\ finished' = TRUE
          /\ UNCHANGED <<seqNum, retransCount, channel, acked>>

Next == \/ SendChunk
        \/ Retransmit
        \/ TimeoutTick
        \/ ReceiveAck
        \/ Finish

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seqNum, chunks, retransCount, timer, channel, acked, finished>>
====
